content:
I can't even see my character in a gacha where I'm supposed to roll characters

Also the artstyle isn't appealing enough for me to want to roll, so I'd be rolling *only* for kits.
maybe they could stick to single storyline games or something?
Would be good as a stand alone game though
the kind that you just play once

These games are quick burst games.

Especially with today's world
sure? again idk what you want by telling me this

gachas are simply inherently malignant to your time... they demand you to play at a schedule rather than play as much as you want for that sweet taste of a "god run"... morimen's train mode at least tries to emulate that feel but its still ultimately about how "invested" your units are
Mostly giving my input on why it is that I think the game would be better as a stand alone than as a gacha.

Ez fix.

Make all units and Enlightenments in train mode be max
yeah and thats fine, thats what makes the genre work within its niche
mmm doing that from a few screenshots when i asked if youve tried it is a pretty far jump i think
We already have turbo fair traphase
I've watched a video, and am continuing to watch it.
that was then, now ur more informed
Calm down, it's not your baby
i think train mode is by far the worst mode of morimens. i was never excited for it.
id argue that the train mode should try to be more like base STS if anything
train mode is like me doing old pdive but with the excitement
i think that would better describe yourself
have u done your monthly one?
as it stands right now its more about the relics than the individual cards you play... but STS has an emphasis on both of those avenues
i noted a game i was looking forward to and the first response before seeing gameplay was "slop"

a bit lazy cuz its too long
and its not counted toward seasonal
maybe lower stat values instead of ridiculously inflated ones
i havent done seasonal mission for sorel wod btw
what do you mean train is not counted
you need to just complete a single run

People aren't allowed to have first impressions of the artstyle and systems present in the screenshots that are meant to advertise the game.

I still don't think it's a good product, by the way. I'm just trying to be civil about it.
i mean more like, make cards scaleable beyond skill level/enlighten level over the course of a run, even potentially creating new cards for units over the course of the run
kinda wish i didnt need to run them but well its extra stuff
OMG IMMA DO IT, FUCK TRAPHASE

sure you can
i just asked if youve played it, and when i noticed you didnt i corrected your assumptions so you could make a better informed decision
